changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE stock_quant (
id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
product_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
location_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
lot_id BIGINT,
company_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
quantity NUMERIC(16,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
reserved_quantity NUMERIC(16,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
in_date TIMESTAMP, -- FIFO
expiry_date TIMESTAMP, -- FEFO created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP,
CONSTRAINT uq_quant UNIQUE (product_id, location_id, lot_id, company_id),
CONSTRAINT chk_quantity_positive CHECK (quantity >= 0), CONSTRAINT chk_reserved_positive CHECK (reserved_quantity >= 0) );
